objectives: Parse URLs with WHATWG URL and inspect scheme, credentials, host, port, path, query, and fragment before trust decisions.

Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Authorized site auditing and TypeScript Diagnose the hidden failure · Quiz Idna Display Boundary
steps.instruction:
quiz case — A quiz TypeScript team handles case 6610 during an authorized municipal service audit. Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to reconcile URL parsing, base resolution, fetch identity, conservative keys, IDNA, and rejected schemes; release evidence binds source, compiler, emitted JavaScript, lockfile, package, browser revision, container, configuration, and restored state; then change one HTML repair, Cheerio mode, selector, unknown value, record schema, link relation, or metadata case and retain rejected evidence. Browser TypeScript uses pure bounded models and original URL, robots, sitemap, HTTP, HTML, frontier, accessibility, browser, and report fixtures only. Real DNS, Fetch, streams, Cheerio, Playwright, axe-core, files, processes, packages, containers, assistive-technology review, load, legal review, restore, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Keep display and network host forms separate, reject credentials and unsafe schemes, and expose failed or confusable IDNA decisions.
